name: Apple Hospitality REIT, Inc.
summary: The Company, formed in November 2007 as a Virginia corporation, is a self-advised REIT that invests in income-producing real estate, primarily in the lodging sector, in the United States (U.S.). The Company has elected to be treated as a REIT for U.S. federal income tax purposes. As of December 31, 2025, the Company owned 217 hotels with an aggregate of 29,583 guest rooms located in urban, high-end suburban and developing markets throughout 37 states and the District of Columbia (D.C.) and subst...
